title: RNC delegates formally nominate JD Vance to be Trump's vice president
shortDescription: Sen. J.D. Vance arrived at Fiserv Forum Monday afternoon, walking in as Nashville-based band Sixwire played Merle Haggard’s 'America First.'

title: Biden says he did not incite violence against Trump
shortDescription: In an exclusive interview with NBC, President Joe Biden said he did not use language that would incite violence against President Trump.

title: Michiganders react to Sen. JD Vance becoming Trump's VP pick
shortDescription: The 39-year-old Ohio senator and author becomes the third GOP vice presidential nominee in four election cycles from the Midwest.

title: Arizona Republican who talked of lynching casts Trump delegate votes
shortDescription: Shelby Busch, who said she "would lynch" an election official, cast Arizona's roll call votes for Trump at the GOP convention.

title: Secret Service debunks claim about denied Trump security | Fact check
shortDescription: The Secret Service and FBI both said the claim is false, and that extra resources and technology had been allocated to Trump's rally.

title: Trump supporters sell T-shirts, other merch with rally shooting photo
shortDescription:
Hundreds of T-shirts are for sale displaying the photo of 
Donald Trump raising his fists after being shot at his rally in Butler, Pennsylvania.

title: Biden: It was a 'mistake' to talk about 'bullseye' on Donald Trump
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said he meant "focus" not "crosshairs" when he talked about putting a "bullseye" on election opponent Donald Trump.

title: What religion is Trump's VP pick JD Vance?
shortDescription: Trump's running mate, JD Vance, is Catholic.

title: False claim video shows Trump rally shooting was 'staged' | Fact check
shortDescription: The Secret Service had already confirmed the shooting resulted in casualties by the time the Facebook post was shared on July 14.

title: And Trump's VP pick is...
shortDescription: Donald Trump has picked his running mate, just in time for the RNC. It's Monday's news.

title: Demonstrators outside RNC protest Trump, war in Gaza
shortDescription: Protestors gathered outside the RNC to make their voices heard on issues including supporting abortion rights and opposing the war in Gaza.

title: What is the net worth of JD Vance? A look at GOP VP pick's wealth
shortDescription: J.D. Vance is a venture capitalist and best-selling author. He also could be Republican Donald Trump's pick for VP. So how much is Vance worth?

title: Biden campaign pushes Trump running mate Vance to debate Kamala Harris
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris is "prepared" to debate Republican Donald Trump's new running mate, Ohio Sen. J.D. Vance, the Biden campaign says.

title: OnPolitics: Donald Trump selects JD Vance as running mate
shortDescription: Donald Trump selected Ohio Senator J.D. Vance on Monday to be his 2024 vice-presidential running mate.

title: YouTuber on seeing Trump gunman in his T-shirt: ‘shocked and confused’
shortDescription: A popular gun influencer said his team was shocked and confused that the Trump shooter wore his shirt on Saturday.
